content:
## Problem

`instance.status` is `Option<google_cloud_compute_v1::model::instance::Status>` — a typed enum — not `Option<String>`, so `.as_deref()` (which requires the inner type to implement `Deref`) doesn't compile. The same bug appears in both `find_instance` and `wait_for_ssh`.

## Fix

Convert the enum to a string via its `Debug` representation (which gives `"Running"`, `"Stopped"`, etc.) and call `.to_uppercase()` so the rest of the code's comparisons against `"RUNNING"` continue to work unchanged.

```rust
// Before (broken – Status is an enum, not a String)
let status = instance.status.as_deref().unwrap_or("").to_string();

// After
let status = instance.status
    .map(|s| format!("{s:?}").to_uppercase())
    .unwrap_or_default();
```

Apply that change in **both** places — `find_instance` (line ~168) and `wait_for_ssh` (line ~220):

```rust
// src/main.rs  – find_instance
            let zone = zone_key
                .strip_prefix("zones/")
                .unwrap_or(&zone_key)
                .to_string();
-           let status = instance.status.as_deref().unwrap_or("").to_string();
+           let status = instance.status
+               .map(|s| format!("{s:?}").to_uppercase())
+               .unwrap_or_default();
```

```rust
// src/main.rs  – wait_for_ssh
-       let status = instance.status.as_deref().unwrap_or("").to_string();
+       let status = instance.status
+           .map(|s| format!("{s:?}").to_uppercase())
+           .unwrap_or_default();
```

### Why this works

| `Status` variant | `format!("{:?}", s)` | `.to_uppercase()` |
|---|---|---|
| `Running` | `"Running"` | `"RUNNING"` ✓ |
| `Stopped` | `"Stopped"` | `"STOPPED"` ✓ |
| `Terminated` | `"Terminated"` | `"TERMINATED"` ✓ |

Every string comparison in the rest of the program (`== "RUNNING"`, printed to the terminal, etc.) continues to work exactly as before.
